name: Apprentice Naya
dialogue: You've got the look of a first-timer.
Don't feel bad — everyone starts somewhere.
But I started yesterday. Let's see what you've got.
preBattleLine: Naya flicks dust off her sleeves — here she comes!
postDefeatDialogue: Have you seen the poster? The Five Pillars Dojo is looking for challengers.
I'm not strong enough yet… but you might be. Keep going.
